subcodes.first_line: O My trusted ones in the lands and My chosen ones amidst the servants! Upon you rest My glory and My loving-kindness in these days when darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امنائی فی البلاد و اصفیائی بین العباد علیکم بهائی و عنایتی ایامیکه ظلمت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
